control-implementation.description: CyberForge Platform NIST 800-53 Rev 5 control implementation.

implemented-requirements.description: Kubernetes RBAC with OIDC integration provides account management.

by-components.description: Role-based access control is defined in tenancy/rbac/kubernetes/rbac.yaml.

implemented-requirements.description: Remote access is restricted to approved jump servers with MFA.

by-components.description: Network policies enforced by Cilium prevent unauthorized remote access paths.

implemented-requirements.description: All Kubernetes API server audit events are forwarded to ELK stack SIEM.

by-components.description: Filebeat DaemonSet collects and forwards logs. Retention configured in ELK values.

implemented-requirements.description: Audit logs stored in MinIO with object-lock enabled to prevent tampering.

by-components.description: MinIO bucket 'cyberforge-backups' has objectlocking=true per minio-values.yaml.

implemented-requirements.description: STIG hardening applied via Ansible playbook and enforced by Kyverno policies.
HashiCorp Vault manages dynamic secrets with automatic rotation and TTL enforcement.

by-components.description: Vault configured in HA mode per vault-values.yaml with AWS KMS auto-unseal.

implemented-requirements.description: All container images signed with Cosign and validated at admission by Kyverno.

by-components.description: Kyverno ClusterPolicy 'require-signed-images' enforced in all non-exempt namespaces.
